verses.text: Woe to the proud drunkards of Ephraim, their glory 'a fading flower' soon trodden down. Their splendour is brief. Pride flushed with wine ripens quickly for the fall.
Woe to the proud drunkards of Ephraim, their glory 'a fading flower' soon trodden down. Their splendour is brief. Pride flushed with wine ripens quickly for the fall.
Woe to the proud drunkards of Ephraim, their glory 'a fading flower' soon trodden down. Their splendour is brief. Pride flushed with wine ripens quickly for the fall.
Woe to the proud drunkards of Ephraim, their glory 'a fading flower' soon trodden down. Their splendour is brief. Pride flushed with wine ripens quickly for the fall.
Yet in that day the LORD Himself shall be 'a crown of glory' to the remnant of His people. He replaces their lost glory. Where men's honour fades, God is the unfading crown of His own.
Yet in that day the LORD Himself shall be 'a crown of glory' to the remnant of His people. He replaces their lost glory. Where men's honour fades, God is the unfading crown of His own.

But priest and prophet too have erred through wine, stumbling in vision and judgment, their tables filled with filth. Even leaders are corrupted. When the guides are drunk, the whole people lose their way.

But priest and prophet too have erred through wine, stumbling in vision and judgment, their tables filled with filth. Even leaders are corrupted. When the guides are drunk, the whole people lose their way.

They mock the prophet's teaching as fit only for babes, 'precept upon precept... line upon line.' They despise plain instruction. The scornful belittle the patient teaching that would have saved them.

They mock the prophet's teaching as fit only for babes, 'precept upon precept... line upon line.' They despise plain instruction. The scornful belittle the patient teaching that would have saved them.
So God will speak to them by foreign tongues, and the word they mocked will trip them up. Refused teaching becomes a snare. The truth despised returns as judgment on the despiser.
So God will speak to them by foreign tongues, and the word they mocked will trip them up. Refused teaching becomes a snare. The truth despised returns as judgment on the despiser.
So God will speak to them by foreign tongues, and the word they mocked will trip them up. Refused teaching becomes a snare. The truth despised returns as judgment on the despiser.
The scornful rulers boast a 'covenant with death' and a refuge of lies. They imagine themselves safe in falsehood. Men still build false securities to escape the reckoning they dread.
The scornful rulers boast a 'covenant with death' and a refuge of lies. They imagine themselves safe in falsehood. Men still build false securities to escape the reckoning they dread.

But God lays in Zion 'a tried stone, a precious corner stone... he that believeth shall not make haste.' This is Christ. The only sure foundation is the Stone God has laid; faith in Him is never put to shame.

But God lays in Zion 'a tried stone, a precious corner stone... he that believeth shall not make haste.' This is Christ. The only sure foundation is the Stone God has laid; faith in Him is never put to shame.
Their covenant with death shall be annulled, and the scourge shall sweep them away, the bed too short for rest. False refuge fails. When judgment comes, every lie men trusted leaves them exposed.
Their covenant with death shall be annulled, and the scourge shall sweep them away, the bed too short for rest. False refuge fails. When judgment comes, every lie men trusted leaves them exposed.
Their covenant with death shall be annulled, and the scourge shall sweep them away, the bed too short for rest. False refuge fails. When judgment comes, every lie men trusted leaves them exposed.
Their covenant with death shall be annulled, and the scourge shall sweep them away, the bed too short for rest. False refuge fails. When judgment comes, every lie men trusted leaves them exposed.
Their covenant with death shall be annulled, and the scourge shall sweep them away, the bed too short for rest. False refuge fails. When judgment comes, every lie men trusted leaves them exposed.
Isaiah shows the farmer plowing, sowing, and ordering each seed in its place, taught by God. Even husbandry reflects divine wisdom. The God who instructs the plowman governs all His works with skill.
Isaiah shows the farmer plowing, sowing, and ordering each seed in its place, taught by God. Even husbandry reflects divine wisdom. The God who instructs the plowman governs all His works with skill.
Isaiah shows the farmer plowing, sowing, and ordering each seed in its place, taught by God. Even husbandry reflects divine wisdom. The God who instructs the plowman governs all His works with skill.
Isaiah shows the farmer plowing, sowing, and ordering each seed in its place, taught by God. Even husbandry reflects divine wisdom. The God who instructs the plowman governs all His works with skill.

Different grains are threshed in different ways, 'this also cometh forth from the LORD... wonderful in counsel.' His dealings are fitted to each. As the farmer suits his method to the crop, so God measures His discipline wisely.
